meta-description: Learn about plan IDs by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Plan ID
excerpt: Each Marketplace health plan has a unique 14-character identifier that's a combination of numbers and/or letters.
content:
Each Marketplace health plan has a unique 14-character identifier that's a combination of numbers and/or letters.

You can find a plan's ID below the plan name when you preview plans and prices.

If you’ve already enrolled in a plan, you'll find your plan's ID in your Marketplace account under "My Plans and Programs."

Note: Your Plan ID is different from your Application ID.

Related Content

  • How do I find my plan ID?
  • Keep or change your plan
